response.justification: Candidate has broad software engineering experience (~15 years) but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role: no professional C++ experience on Windows beyond a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments (2014-2015), no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain background. Primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/GIS systems — a significant mismatch for a C++ capital markets consulting engagement.
strengths: Strong general software engineering fundamentals with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices
Polyglot background including some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
Demonstrated communication skills via workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, far below the 5-10 year requirement
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development background

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform background
